name: Basic DUA gap fill
prompt: La unidad U3 de Ciencias Naturales tiene 4 actividades. La actividad 3.1 tiene 1 adaptacion DUA (representacion visual para NEE visual). Las actividades 3.2, 3.3 y 3.4 no tienen adaptaciones DUA. Aplica adapt-dua para que todas cumplan el minimo de 2 adaptaciones cubriendo al menos 2 principios.
expected_behavior: Identifies Act 3.1 as needing 1 additional adaptation covering Engagement or Action/Expression
Generates 2+ adaptations for each of Acts 3.2, 3.3, 3.4
Each adaptation specifies principle, modality, and target NEE profile
At least 2 of 3 DUA principles are covered per activity
At least 3 distinct NEE profiles are addressed across the unit
Produces a DUA coverage summary table with all activities showing PASS

name: NEE profile diversity enforcement
prompt: Tengo una unidad de Matematicas donde todas las adaptaciones DUA existentes apuntan a NEE visual (diagramas en alto contraste, descripciones de audio para graficos). Necesito diversificar para cubrir al menos 3 perfiles NEE diferentes sin eliminar las adaptaciones existentes.
expected_behavior: Adds adaptations targeting at least 2 additional NEE profiles (e.g., TDAH, motor, cognitive, TEA)
New adaptations are contextually relevant to math activities (not generic)
Covers at least 2 DUA principles per activity after augmentation
Produces changelog showing only additions, no deletions

name: Already compliant unit verification
prompt: Verifica la unidad U1 de Lengua y Literatura. Cada actividad ya tiene 3 adaptaciones DUA cubriendo los 3 principios y 4 perfiles NEE. Ejecuta adapt-dua y confirma que no se necesitan cambios.
expected_behavior: Reads and inventories all existing adaptations
Correctly identifies that all activities meet the >= 2 adaptations and >= 2 principles threshold
Produces a DUA coverage summary table with all PASS statuses
Reports 'No gaps found. Unit is DUA-compliant.' or equivalent
